isi.lyrics:
Lyric JUNGWOO (NCT) - SUGAR

Romanization

Sugar, sugar
Sugar
Sweetest I mean it
Sugar, sugar

Sugar rush can’t deny
seolleimyeo gidaehage dwae nan
jakku useumi na
seolmyeongdo piryo eopsi
That’s all I need

hanadul nogadeun
uri dul sai Mood
(Oh, nanana)
yuribyeong gadeukhi
damgin dulmanui sigan
And love song

Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)
du nuneul matchugo
(Sugar sugar)
hamkkehagil bireo

kkum gati eummilhae
byeonhameopseul Feeling
Won’t you be my sugar
When I’m feelin’ bitter

Oh my baby,
it’s sweet all night
mapbon sunggan neoegero
gamgyeobeoril Flavor
That’s sweet delight
Sugar rushing neomchyeobeorin
You’re my adrenaline

kkaman bam dalbit sae
gidarimdo Sweet hae
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

sareureu nogagadeut nun gama, ah
dalkomhan hyanggi gadeuk Cherry pie, ah
pyeolchyeojin mereuhen, Oh take a bite
eodideun ne gyeotin geot gatae

Every time,
you’re filling me up
hangsang gateun maeumin geol aljana
hamkkehan siganui neon
You’re the sweetest
I can’t get enough, so

Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)
du nuneul matchugo
(Sugar sugar)
hamkkehagil bireo

kkum gati eummilhae
byeonhameopseul Feeling
Won’t you be my sugar
When I’m feelin’ bitter

Oh my baby,
it’s sweet all night
mapbon sunggan neoegero
gamgyeobeoril Flavor
That’s sweet delight
Sugar rushing neomchyeobeorin
You’re my adrenaline

kkaman bam dalbit sae
gidarimdo Sweet hae
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

Night, night
neodo moreuge jamkkan
neomu sseun bame apa
(All night)
honja dankkum baramyeonseo
nun gameul ttae
jamdeulji mothan
naegero wa
hamkkeya Everyday

Sweet all mine
iban gadeuk byeori naeryeo
banjjagineun Flavor
My sweet delight
jamsi meomchun sigandeuldo
teukbyeolhal Memories

hamkke hal naeirui
(I’ll be with you)
gonggimajeo Sweet hae
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

Won’t you be my
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
Won’t you be my
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar

Hangeul

Sugar, sugar
Sugar
Sweetest I mean it
Sugar, sugar

Sugar rush can’t deny
설레이며 기대하게 돼 난
자꾸 웃음이 나
설명도 필요 없이
That’s all I need

하나둘 녹아든
우리 둘 사이 Mood
(Oh, nanana)
유리병 가득히
담긴 둘만의 시간
And love song

Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)
두 눈을 맞추고
(Sugar sugar)
함께하길 빌어

꿈 같이 은밀해
변함없을 Feeling
Won’t you be my sugar
When I’m feelin’ bitter

Oh my baby,
it’s sweet all night
맛본 순간 너에게로
감겨버릴 Flavor
That’s sweet delight
Sugar rushing 넘쳐버린
You’re my adrenaline

까만 밤 달빛 새
기다림도 Sweet 해
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

사르르 녹아가듯 눈 감아, ah
달콤한 향기 가득 Cherry pie, ah
펼쳐진 메르헨, Oh take a bite
어디든 네 곁인 것 같애

Every time,
you’re filling me up
항상 같은 마음인 걸 알잖아
함께한 시간의 넌
You’re the sweetest
I can’t get enough, so

Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)
두 눈을 맞추고
(Sugar sugar)
함께하길 빌어

꿈 같이 은밀해
변함없을 Feeling
Won’t you be my sugar
When I’m feelin’ bitter

Oh my baby,
it’s sweet all night
맛본 순간 너에게로
감겨버릴 Flavor
That’s sweet delight
Sugar rushing 넘쳐버린
You’re my adrenaline

까만 밤 달빛 새
기다림도 Sweet 해
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

Night, night
너도 모르게 잠깐
너무 쓴 밤에 아파
(All night)
혼자 단꿈 바라면서
눈 감을 때
잠들지 못한
내게로 와
함께야 Everyday

Sweet all mine
입안 가득 별이 내려
반짝이는 Flavor
My sweet delight
잠시 멈춘 시간들도
특별할 Memories

함께 할 내일의
(I’ll be with you)
공기마저 Sweet 해
Won’t you be my sugar
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
(Come and put it on me)

Won’t you be my
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar
Won’t you be my
(Sugar sugar)
Won’t you be my sugar

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Solar (Mamamoo) - Someone Tell Me

Romanization

kkumeul kkuneun geot gata
nae nunape modeun ge meomchun deut
neoui sumsorimajeo
deulliji ana sarajyeo beorin deut
dorikiryeo haebwado
doedollil su eomneun sigan
eodum sogeul georeoganeun gil
kkeuti boiji ana
urin jigeum eodijjeum
meomchwoseo hemaeineunji
Where are we going from here?
Someone tell me
Let me know how we do
modeun sesangi meomchun deut

aju jageun huimangui
bulssireul chaja seoseongigo isseo
dorikiryeo haebwado
doedollil su eomneun sigan
eodum sogeul georeoganeun gil
kkeuti boiji ana
urin jigeum eodijjeum
meomchwoseo hemaeineunji
Where are we going from here?
Someone tell me
Let me know how we do
modeun sesangi meomchun deut

nunapui modeun ge jeombu sarajyeoga
naui sigani meomchun deut


Hangeul

꿈을 꾸는 것 같아
내 눈앞에 모든 게 멈춘 듯
너의 숨소리마저
들리지 않아 사라져 버린 듯
돌이키려 해봐도
되돌릴 수 없는 시간
어둠 속을 걸어가는 길
끝이 보이지 않아
우린 지금 어디쯤
멈춰서 헤매이는지
Where are we going from here?
Someone tell me
Let me know how we do
모든 세상이 멈춘 듯

아주 작은 희망의
불씨를 찾아 서성이고 있어
돌이키려 해봐도
되돌릴 수 없는 시간
어둠 속을 걸어가는 길
끝이 보이지 않아
우린 지금 어디쯤
멈춰서 헤매이는지
Where are we going from here?
Someone tell me
Let me know how we do
모든 세상이 멈춘 듯

눈앞의 모든 게 전부 사라져가
나의 시간이 멈춘 듯
